price: Keineswegs! Wenn die Erde eingeebnet, ja platt eingeebnet wird
arabic: كَلَّآۖ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ دَكّٗا دَكّٗا

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: kallā idhā dukkati al-arḍu dakkan dakkan
